basic_details.job_title: KRCL Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Assistant Account Officer, Section Officer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Assistant Account Officer, Section Officer, Account Assistant
basic_details.short_information: Konkan Railway Corporation Limited (KRCL) Accounts Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 19 May 2026 on the official website Konkan Railway Corporation Limited. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced through the KRCL Accounts Posts Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Max 35 years for Assistant Account Officer and Account Assistant, Max 40 years for Section Officer.
age_limit.details: Assistant Account Officer: Maximum 35 years Account Assistant: Maximum 35 years Section Officer: Maximum 40 years Age Relaxation: 3 years for OBC(NCL); discretionary for Ex-servicemen

qualification.education_qualification: CMA / CA, B.Com, M.Com, Inter CA/CMA
qualification.details: Assistant Account Officer: CMA / CA Section Officer: B.Com / M.Com / Inter CA/CMA from recognized university with required experience Account Assistant: B.Com / M.Com / Inter CA/CMA from recognized university with required experience

salary_details.details: Assistant Account Officer: Consolidated Remuneration Rs. 67140 - 76660 per month Section Officer: Consolidated Remuneration Rs. 50060 - 57140 per month Account Assistant: Consolidated Remuneration Rs. 41380 - 47220 per month

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Preliminary Screening Group Discussion or Written Test (if required) Document Verification Merit List

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for KRCL Accounts Posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled on different dates for each post: 17th June 2026 for Account Assistant, 18th June 2026 for Assistant Account Officer, and 19th June 2026 for Section Officer.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by KRCL?
faq.answer: Konkan Railway Corporation Limited has announced a total of 9 vacancies for various Accounts posts through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Accounts Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Accounts Assistant post, candidates must possess a B.Com, M.Com, or Inter CA/CMA qualification from a recognized university, along with the required experience.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for KRCL Accounts Posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the KRCL Accounts Posts recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Section Officer post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Section Officer post is 40 years. For Assistant Account Officer and Account Assistant, the maximum age limit is 35 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Account Officer position?
faq.answer: The consolidated remuneration for the Assistant Account Officer position ranges from Rs. 67140 to Rs. 76660 per month.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the KRCL Accounts Posts?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue with all required documents on the scheduled date.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews will be conducted at Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra. The exact venue details are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Preliminary Screening, Walk-in Interview, and potentially a Group Discussion or Written Test, followed by Document Verification and Merit List preparation.
